summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BLUE BAY Fleet Management System - Backend APIs working perfectly, Frontend authentication fixed, but routing issues found for Live Tracking and Analytics pages

integration_issues.issue: Live Tracking and Analytics pages not loading correctly - always redirects to Admin Dashboard

passed_tests: Backend API health check - 100% success rate
User authentication for all roles (admin, driver, salesman) - APIs working
Admin Dashboard - loads correctly with navigation, stats, routes, and vehicle data
Salesman Dashboard - loads correctly, displays today's sales stats (1 sale, ₹200), sales entry form works, recent sales section shows data
Sales Recording - complete API flow working (create sale, get sales)
Vehicle Tracking APIs - location update and retrieval working
Analytics APIs - dashboard analytics endpoint working
Frontend login flow fixed and working for all user types
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend routing issue - Live Tracking (/live-tracking) and Analytics (/analytics) pages are not loading correctly and always redirect to Admin Dashboard. The pages exist and have proper data-testid attributes, but React Router navigation is not working properly.
